h1: Create Your Perfect Space with a Designer Gas Fireplace
h2: Cosmo, the Fireplace for Every Room

paragraphs: If you’re thinking about creating a space to kick your home up a notch in favor of contemporary design, adding a gas fireplace may be the only investment you need to make. That’s because now more than ever, fireplaces are focal points that set the design tone, naturally capturing the attention of all eyes entering the space.
When creating your perfectly contemporary space, you’ll want to choose a designer gas fireplace that’s perfectly suited for the room or outdoor area. Here are a few of our favorites!

What better time to be making our homes our sanctuaries and investing in them for comfort, ambiance and connectedness? Create a space that inspires relaxation with the Mezzo See-Through. Two-sided viewing elevates your space end to end and offers multiple design possibilities. The clean finish highlights a style that is fashion-forward, making your home part of the future.

Available in single-sided or see-through models, the Primo is the epitome of modern minimalism. The linear indoor gas fireplace features patented SafeSurface Glass, leaving no exposed seams, mesh or metal trim, meaning you get a completely unobstructed view of the bold flames accentuated with LED underlighting in six vibrant colors. At the same time, the SafeSurface Wall lets you use any type of finishing material right up to the fireplace opening, so you can finish the wall around the fireplace with any material. You can also safely hang a television or artwork right above the fireplace for a clean, refined look.
With an iconic, inspiring design, the Primo II is a favorite among high-end home builders, architects and interior designers.

This is stunning, contemporary design at its best for outdoor spaces. The Lanai brings linear outdoors with a stainless-steel interior that magnifies the voluminous flames as they stretch across the entire length of the fireplace. It comes standard with seven colors of LED interior lights that shine through the translucent glass firebed, each highlighting the flames in a different way. You can adjust the lights to three intensity levels and can also turn them on when the flames are off, creating a colorful display on hot summer nights.

With a Twilight Modern see-through gas fireplace, you can enjoy a contemporary fire experience both inside and outside your house. It is a sleek, contemporary, two-sided fireplace specifically designed to work simultaneously indoors and outdoors. Flames rise through modern media and reflect on a black porcelain firebox. Perfect for remodeling projects, there is no need for an exterior vent cap since the outdoor face of the fireplace acts as a vent. This makes installation easier and allows for more home placement locations.
Feeling inspired to stop dreaming and make your perfect space reality? Visit your local authorized Heat & Glo dealer today to get started on your project.
Clean-lined, contemporary and beautiful, this modern linear gas fireplace fits in everywhere.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
